title: CLI object search
purpose: Let analysts search project objects without opening the TUI, matching common reverse engineering workflows where users first grep strings/imports/functions from the shell.

criteria: revdeck search <project> <query> opens an existing project and reuses ObjectQueryRepository::search_objects
--kind normalizes dashed kind names to snake_case ObjectKind values
--json emits stable refs, labels, metadata, addresses, and sizes
text output is useful for copy/paste into inspect or TUI commands
